title: Shinjis Dark Secret
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's Dark Secret             Quote Post by Hiromakuta » Tue Jan 24, 2006 6:24 am Amazing New Discovery! This is undeniable proof that Shinji is a girl!

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Jan 24, 2006 7:17 am ?.....?......?........WTF?!!?!?!?? in which episode is this?? is that a joke or something??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 24, 2006 9:16 am This is from a very brief sequence in EoE, where we see the Reiquarium - only the heads morph into Shinji's. Combine that with the fact that when Rei asks "what is it you wish for?" the background behind the delirious Ikari-kun is a woman's upper torso, and you might draw some interesting conclusions. Search-bait: shinjiquarium

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jan 24, 2006 10:40 am Shinji with boobs....*giggles. Does anyone have any clue as to the signfigance of this shot? What exactly do you all think it was meant to convey? Shinji projecting himself onto Rei because of their similarly recluse personalities, or Shinji's desire to be loved by his father who payed attention (not loved) Rei instead?

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Jan 24, 2006 11:16 am What they said; a funny misconception.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Jan 24, 2006 12:06 pm Yeah, I knew that for a while now. PWNED AGDGYASDGA7DFSDGFSEJHRWR *egoboost*

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Tue Jan 24, 2006 12:34 pm :shock: Yes, a very... disturbing scene, to say the least. :shock: This was presented a while ago to an equally shocked Evamonkey forum community. Check it out if you want to read some fans responding to some good old-fashioned Eva mind screwing: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=210 I believe this post from that thread sums it up perfectly: coff wrote: Damn you Anno. leave me alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Tue Jan 24, 2006 12:45 pm Well, it's already been established that Shinji has no balls, so perhaps this revelation isn't as radical as it may appear. â€”C. "Who knew an Eva could kick its own ass? Very educational!" â€”Mandy moore

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 24, 2006 12:52 pm This find was freaky but thats all.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jan 24, 2006 1:14 pm I remember this and reading in, I think it was here, about what it means if you dream of yourself as being a member of the opposite sex. However, I... can't remember what it said! It may not apply to this anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Jan 24, 2006 3:16 pm god,....why do I have it in a such terrible quality?!! WHY!?!? I could not see even this! Damn it I am going to buy the remastered edition, when it comes here ..........my god, Shinji may be kaoru :shock:

[]: maybe not             Quote Post by ayanami_the_fifth » Sat Feb 11, 2006 9:21 am Rei was the dummy plug template, her clones were supposed to be cloned in the dummy system. perhaps Shinji was originally attempted to be the dummy plug template, and he was cloned and dumped in the system instead...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Feb 11, 2006 11:05 am I could have sworn I had the frame by frame video of this in the omake section since a year ago... what in the hell happened to it?

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Mon Feb 13, 2006 4:36 pm While I like Ayanami the fifth's theory I always thought it was symbolic of Shinji's mental state. He feels just like Rei by this point in the film. (if not much earlier) A tool, A souless doll Gendo needs for his goals. There are many macabre symbols in EoE but that shot right there (as well as any other of the shots featuring the Rei tank) never ceases to give me the chills.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Feb 14, 2006 9:23 am As I recall, x part of Yui's DNA has been used to clone Ayanami, which means that Shinji and Ayanami are at least half-brothers/sisters of each other (how surprising!!!). And maybe Shinji had a premonition that Ayanami is his sister, and maybe this caused those Ayanami heads turn into Shinji heads. Maybe ... EDIT: On second thought, the Shinji on the lower right corner reminds me of Gollum...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:09 pm BUMPED FOR GREAT JUSTICE! My theory: the shot symbolizes Shinji's "feminine" behavior as opposed to acting more like a stereotypical man. "You're a man, aren't you?" "Pathetic! There's nothing worse than a housebroken male!", etc, etc, *shrugs*

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:21 pm What does that have to do with the actual context, though?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: BUMPED FOR GREAT JUSTICE! My theory: the shot symbolizes Shinji's "feminine" behavior as opposed to acting more like a stereotypical man. "You're a man, aren't you?" "Pathetic! There's nothing worse than a housebroken male!", etc, etc, *shrugs*

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:25 pm Reichu wrote: What does that have to do with the actual context, though?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh, explaining why the scene's there to begin with? I dunno.
